task: I need to send my teacher a short note because a homework assignment may come in a little late after my evening schedule changed. Can you help me make it brief and school-appropriate, with just enough information to explain the delay?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a brief, school-appropriate note you can send:

**Hi [Teacher’s Name], I wanted to let you know that my homework may be a little late because my evening schedule changed. I’m still working on it and will turn it in as soon as I can. Thank you for understanding.**

If you want, I can also make it **more formal** or **more casual**.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and clean.
